versions.changelog: Added city, suburb, and neighborhood labels across the Greater Cairo bbox (17 cities, 191 suburbs, 20 neighborhoods). Fixed labels to render in English (Giza, Dokki, Mohandeseen, 6th of October, Old Cairo, etc.) instead of Arabic by re-querying Overpass with a name:en fallback chain. Rebuilt PMTiles to include the three label layers that were missing from the 2.1.0 build.
Expanded building coverage with Overture and Microsoft Buildings data (~4x increase over OSM-only). Regenerated demand using LODES census commuting flows for more realistic job/resident distribution.
Fix: repaired corrupted buildings_index.json that prevented building demolition in-game.

Major update: merged 1.3M+ building footprints and 725K+ road segments from Overture Maps (Google Open Buildings + Microsoft + OSM). Demand data generated from building density via Voronoi tessellation.
